title: Research Agent Contract
description: Input/output schema for the Research Agent (Anna). Output must conform to agents/research/templates/research_output.md. Includes competitor analysis, keyword research, and user question research from Reddit/forums/Quora to inform H2 structure.

topic.description: Content topic or target keyword for research

campaign_id.description: Optional identifier for the research output header

client_name.description: Optional client or project name for the research output header

date.description: Date for research output header (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to run date if omitted.

source_materials.description: Optional: URLs, file paths, or text snippets to use as source material

output.description: Research output is for blog writing — SEO, AEO, and GEO optimized. Must follow agents/research/templates/research_output.md. Section 10 (AEO) must include featured snippet opportunities, PAA questions, voice search queries, and schema recommendations. Section 11 (GEO) must include AI coverage check, entity clarity assessment, fact density requirements, E-E-A-T signals, and citation-worthiness recommendations.
